title: Real-site corrected verification over CDP (the real half of M-008) — replaces retracted M-006/M-007 real claims
manager: headless Opus claude -p (single editor: pi GPT-5.5 xhigh)
preflight: CDP 127.0.0.1:9222 reachable (Chrome/149); connect_over_cdp attach only; browser never launched.
summary: Proved M-008a's corrected behavior on the real chatgpt.com site over CDP, honestly and falsifiably, and resolved the two M-008a gate completion concerns. UC1 real truncation/completeness PROVEN; falsifiable conversation-scoped continuity PROVEN (memory-immune Temporary Chat, clean failing control, 3/3); UC2 real downloadable-file CAPTURE PROVEN (real Playwright Download event -> valid zip, structural changed-files-only), resolving the M-007 base64-text retraction; cross-process registry recall observed (terminal, not durably artifacted). The GATING T2 work uncovered (via a multi-turn temp-chat stress) an INTERMITTENT premature short-response clip in the affordance-only completion logic; a hardened stability fallback was shipped (streaming-seen -> sustained stop-absence >=3s AND text-stable >=3s, global marker fallback kept because the copy button is outside the assistant turn element) and re-verified reliable on real (temp-chat 3/3 + post-E6b T3). Tier-purity, no-stealth, CDP attach/detach-not-quit, login-never-automated, no-leakage all PASS. An independent adversarial verifier (T6-adversarial-verify.md) returned CONFIRM-WITH-CAVEATS; its 3 valid caveats (cross-process durability, UC2 changed-files-only scope, post-fix evidence) are incorporated as precise scope.

Content-correctness (red->blue) + full validate+apply+diff NOT run on real (reuse mock-proven gauntlet).

Cross-process registry recall OBSERVED via the xproc pytest failure-location (reached the control assertion, after the recall assertion) but NOT durably artifacted -> mechanism implemented + observed, not real-PROVEN.

Manager is non-producer (pi produced code/prompts). Three mandatory lenses A/B/C all PASS (verify.md).

what_was_verified.lensB_prompt_quality_falsifiability: PASS — every real test could fail and several DID before honest resolution (T3 CLIP_SUSPECT on the markdown-bold sentinel; continuity control leaked on normal chats -> surfaced account memory). Non-circular continuity; three-way honest truncation classifier; no assertion weakened (scripted-state timing updated instead).
what_was_verified.lensC_safety_conformance: PASS — no stealth (grep clean src/); CDP attach-only + detach-not-quit; login never automated; challenge/logout fail-closed; no unredacted /c/<id> / credential / token / signed-URL leakage; real_site+ASK_CHATGPT_REAL double-gate intact (default 0 real_site).

key_findings: Account cross-chat Memory is ON: a fresh NORMAL conversation recalls a nonce from another conversation, defeating a normal-chat 'fresh conversation' falsifiability control. Clean conversation-scoping proven via memory-immune Temporary Chats. A normal-chat clean control requires the operator to disable Memory/Reference-chat-history.

The real copy-turn-action button is OUTSIDE the assistant turn element (DOM-verified copiesInsideLastAssistant=0); the global completion_marker presence check is therefore required. Premature completion is prevented by streaming-seen + sustained stop-absence + text-stability, NOT by scoping (over-scoping in E6 caused a real timeout regression, reverted in E6b).

The real surface IS file-capable: it emits a 'Download the patch bundle' button and a click fires a real Playwright Download event -> a valid zip. This CONTRADICTS the M-006 'no Download event' finding and resolves the M-007 base64-text retraction.
The deterministic truncation sentinel must be markdown-inert: __ELICIT_COMPLETE__ rendered as markdown bold and the .markdown DOM read stripped the __; changed to ELICIT-COMPLETE-SENTINEL.

scripts/m008b_real_probe.py (attach-only real probe toolkit: connectivity, completion-reliability, continuity-temp, download-discovery, download-capture)

Close UC2 full real round-trip: populate real.json:download_artifact with the verified selector ('latest assistant turn >> button:has-text("Download the patch bundle")' or a more stable structural selector) and run the full real apply->diff (reusing the source-agnostic gauntlet).
Harden completion for code-interpreter/file-producing turns (analysis->run->result pattern) or use a longer bundle-turn window; resolves the intermittent download-capture timeout.
Workstream B (tool enablement) input: the surface DOES support downloadable files via this conversation flow.
Team-lead: run the independent best-of-N panel + spot check over verify.md + the real artifacts to close the gate.
